scheme.ash.title: For Astratch
scheme.ash.introduce: Use the most comprehensive Astratch features, with more extensive block functionalities and additional development tools, to make your projects more professional and powerful.
scheme.scratch.title: For Scratch
scheme.scratch.introduce: Use restricted Astratch features, compatible with all functionalities from Scratch, and can be saved as sb3 files that can be opened in Scratch.
scheme.turbowarp.title: For TurboWarp and its Mods
scheme.turbowarp.introduce: Use restricted Astratch features, compatible with all functionalities & extensions from TurboWarp, and can be saved as sb3 files that can be opened in TurboWarp.
scheme.title: Select Project Target
scheme.introduce: Choose a target platform to configure Astratch's features and compatibility
scheme.ash.title.introduce1: A more convenient management mechanism, enhanced directory readability, and even Git compatibility!
scheme.ash.title.introduce2: Experience the latest compilation optimizations and the most powerful type system — just like TypeScript!
scheme.ash.title.introduce3: Use more creative blocks to build your amazing creations!
scheme.compatible.introduce: Open your sb3 projects in Astratch and save them as sb3 files.
scheme.turbowarp.introduce1: Astratch is compatible with the vast majority of extensions from TurboWarp.
config.title: Config
config.name: Project Name
config.name.tip: As the display name of the project
config.id.tip: As the identifier of the project
